place: North Chaweng, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Five-Bedroom Villa with Infinity Pool and Sea Views - Bophut
note: Daily housekeeping · private chef on request · airport pickup
blurb: A newly renovated five-bedroom villa set high on a Bophut hillside above North Chaweng, built around a 12-metre infinity pool that looks out over tropical gardens to the Gulf of Thailand — five en-suite king bedrooms, two with freestanding tubs open to the sky, daily housekeeping and a private chef on request, five minutes from Chaweng's beaches and ten from the airport.
detail:
Set high on a quiet hillside above North Chaweng, this five-bedroom villa looks out across tropical greenery to the turquoise waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Renovated at the end of 2024, it pairs clean contemporary lines with island warmth, and its open-plan layout and wide terraces make it as easy for an extended family as for a group of friends. Chaweng's beaches and restaurants are about five minutes away, and Samui's airport roughly ten.

Indoors, an air-conditioned open plan links the lounge, dining area and a fully equipped kitchen, all framed by sea views and finished in rich, understated furnishings. The living spaces open straight onto a covered terrace with lounge seating, a shaded sala and beanbags — an easy indoor-outdoor flow that suits long lunches, sundowners and slow afternoons alike.

The five en-suite bedrooms all have king beds, air-conditioning, ceiling fans and high-speed Wi-Fi. Three upper-level suites take in panoramic ocean views, while two lower rooms open directly onto the courtyard. The master and one guest suite feature spa-style bathrooms with freestanding tubs set beneath the open sky, alongside rain showers and double vanities.

At the heart of the villa, a 12-metre infinity pool appears to spill toward the sea, with a shallow zone for children and sun loungers lining the deck. A full-time housekeeper looks after the villa each day, and a private chef can be arranged on request — Western, Asian, vegetarian and children's menus, from a candlelit dinner to a relaxed family meal. Yoga and meditation sessions can also be organised for guests who would like them.

features.l: Panoramic sea views from the hillside
Freestanding outdoor tubs in two suites
Daily housekeeping & private chef on request
Five minutes to Chaweng, ten to the airport
